name: academorix/crud
purpose: Attribute-driven repository layer for every Academorix module — answers how the data is queried and managed via AsRepository, UseModel, filters, sorts, and criteria.
capabilities: Reusable global Scopes (Active, Published, Featured, Tenant)
when_to_use: Building a repository for any tenant-scoped or platform aggregate, or an attribute-driven CRUD endpoint.
when_not_to_use: For model schemas, Blueprint macros, and cache-tag helpers, reach for academorix/database instead.
